scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run sync:real
scripts.setup:mock: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run seed
